title: Cosmo the Spacedog
content:
{{CharHub|Cosmo the Spacedog|Cosmo}} {{Character |image = Cosmo Vol3 Infobox.jpg |real name = Cosmo |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Cosmo the Spacedog{{Ref|GotGV3}}
Cosmo the Dog{{Ref|TGotGHS}}}} |species = [[Dog]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USSR}} (formerly) |gender = Female |affiliation = {{Affiliation|USSR}} (formerly)
*{{WPS|Soviet Space Program}} (formerly)
{{Affiliation|GOTG3}} |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' |tv movie = ''[[The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special]]'' |actor = [[Fred the Dog]]
[[Slate (animal actor)|Slate]] (movement & behavior)
[[Maria Bakalova]] (on-set actor) |voice actor = [[Maria Bakalova]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Just concentrate, you stupid mutt. What?"
"I refuse to do any more work while you demean me.|[[Rocket]] and Cosmo|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} '''Cosmo''' is a [[Dogs|Labrador-breed dog]] who possesses enhanced intelligence and psionic abilities. In [[1966]], she was sent into outer space by the [[Soviet Union]] as part of their {{WPS|Soviet space dogs|space exploration program}}. She was found by the [[Collector]], who kept her on display in his [[Collector's Museum|museum]] on [[Knowhere]], where she was given a collar that allowed her to telepathically speak with others. When the museum was destroyed by the [[Power Stone]] in [[2014]], Cosmo was freed and continued to reside freely on Knowhere. [[2025|Eleven years later]], she reunited with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] after they purchased Knowhere and officially joined their team as they worked to rebuild Knowhere as a community and their headquarters. In [[2026]], following an attack by [[Adam Warlock]], the Guardians left Knowhere to save a mortally wounded [[Rocket]] and left Cosmo and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] in charge until their return. When her fellow Guardians succeeded, Cosmo helped defend Knowhere when it came under attack by [[High Evolutionary]]'s Hell Spawn, and using her powers, she managed to stop the ship from colliding into Knowhere. Following the conflict, [[Star-Lord]], [[Mantis]], [[Nebula]], [[Drax]] and [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] resigned from the team, leaving Cosmo to continue serving as a Guardian alongside new members under the leadership of Rocket. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Soviet Space Program==== {{Quote|[[1966]]. The [[Soviet Union|Soviets]] put me on a rocket, knowing full well I never could return and I would die in a fiery ball of death.|Cosmo|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Cosmo was a Labrador{{Ref|GttMCUGotG}} bred in the [[Soviet Union]] on [[Earth]].{{Ref|GotG}} In [[1966]], the Soviets suited Cosmo up in an astronaut outfit. She was then placed in a rocket and sent into outer space as a test for their {{WPS|Soviet space dogs|space program}}, with no plans to bring Cosmo back to Earth and intending for her to die in space.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Living on Knowhere==== [[File:Cosmo Museum.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo growls at [[Rocket]]]] {{Quote|Why do you let it lick you like that for? Gross.|[[Howard the Duck]] to [[Collector]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} While orbiting in space, Cosmo was discovered by [[Taneleer Tivan]], who kept her in his [[Collector's Museum|museum]] on [[Knowhere]], inside of a large glass box for display. Cosmo underwent scientific enhancement programs that granted her newfound capabilities, including telekinesis, higher durability, improved intelligence, and a much longer lifespan. She was also able to telepathically communicate through her collar.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} In [[2014]], when the soon-to-be [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were guided through the establishment by [[Carina]], Cosmo and [[Rocket]] growled and bared their teeth at each other. [[File:Cosmo2-GOTG.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo survives the [[Collector's Museum]]'s destruction]] When [[Carina]] unleashed energy from the [[Power Stone]], it demolished a large portion of the museum and its properties. Cosmo's box was also destroyed, allowing her to leave her former housing space unscathed, but she chose to remain inside the museum. [[File:Cosmo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo licks [[Taneleer Tivan]]'s face]] Shortly afterwards, while Tivan, who also managed to survive, sat in the ruins of his museum in bandages, Cosmo walked up to him to politely lick his face, as [[Howard the Duck]] commented that it was gross and asked Tivan why he let her lick him.{{Ref|GotG}} In [[2018]], Cosmo survived when [[Thanos]] [[Ambush in Knowhere|attacked]] Knowhere to obtain the [[Reality Stone]].[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1597276078132764673?s=20&t=n5QLLAa7wBvl2mW3o6Z6yA James Gunn on Twitter - November 28, 2022] ===Guardian of the Galaxy=== ====Joining The Team==== By [[2025]], Cosmo was reunited with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] after they bought [[Knowhere]] from the [[Collector]] as their new base of operations. Cosmo was then recruited as a member of the team.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Christmas Celebration==== [[File:Rocket and Cosmo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo and [[Rocket]] work together]] {{Quote|[[Groot]] ruined Christmas again.|Cosmo|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} In [[2025|December 2025]], Cosmo was working with [[Rocket]] to rebuild [[Knowhere]] using her telekinetic powers, however, she ended up getting frustrated with Rocket and asked for treats to work. Later that night, Cosmo along with the other inhabitants of Knowhere, helped [[Mantis]] and [[Drax the Destroyer]] decorate their base with Christmas decorations to cheer up [[Peter Quill]] which ended up temporarily failing because Quill found out [[Kevin Bacon]] was kidnapped. [[File:Christmas Groot.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo and [[Rocket]] decorate [[Groot]]]] After Kevin Bacon agreed to sing to cheer up [[Peter Quill]], Cosmo hunted and killed a [[Orloni]] and gave it to [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] as a Christmas gift. Later, Cosmo and Rocket tried to decorate [[Groot]] as if he was a Christmas tree, but Groot ended up moving, dropping all the decorations in the floor, upsetting Cosmo and Rocket.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} {{Clear}} ====[[Attack on Rocket]]==== [[File:CCCP Spacedog.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo is offended by [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]]] {{Quote|I know you don't really think I am a bad dog. Can you please take it back?"
"I will not.|Cosmo and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} [[2026|Months later]], after finishing their rebuilding of [[Knowhere]], the Guardians usually helped [[Peter Quill]], who was constantly drunk. One night, Cosmo showed off her telekinetic powers to the Knowhere civilians, overshadowing [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], who then called her a "bad dog," hurting her feelings. Shortly after that, [[Adam Warlock]] attacked Knowhere in order to kidnap [[Rocket]], but only mortally wounded him. The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] left Knowhere to save him and put Cosmo and Obfonteri in charge until they would return. Cosmo asked Obfonteri to take back his insult, but he refused.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Attack on Arête Laboratories|Protecting Knowhere]]==== [[File:Cosmo explaining her past.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo continues to express her sorrow]] {{Quote|I knew you believe I am good dog."
"All right, all right, get off me, you idiot.|Cosmo and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Later on, while Cosmo was playing cards with [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], [[Bzermikitokolok]], the [[Broker]], [[Howard the Duck]], [[Steemie Blueliver]] and [[Gridlemop]], she began telling them about how badly the [[Soviet Union|Soviets]] treated her, but they never called her "bad dog." Cosmo's constant complaining annoyed the other players, who begged Obfonteri to take back his words, but he continued to refuse, much to her upset. [[File:Angry cosmo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo protects [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] in battle]] They were then interrupted by [[Peter Quill]], who contacted Obfonteri and told him to bring [[Knowhere]] to the [[Arête Laboratories]] in order to help save [[Nebula]], [[Mantis]] and [[Drax]] who had been captured by [[High Evolutionary]]. Upon doing so, they were promptly attacked by High Evolutionary's [[Hell Spawn]] and henchmen, who managed to infiltrate Knowhere. Obfonteri managed to eliminate the intruders with the [[Yaka Arrow]] until it got stuck, leaving just [[Behemoth]], who charged at him, so Cosmo protected him. Obfonteri finally called Cosmo a "good dog" as she used her powers to slam two walls against Behemoth. An overjoyed Cosmo then licked Obfonteri for his praise. [[File:Mantis and Cosmo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo's power is strengthened by [[Mantis]]]] Once the Arête Laboratories was piloted into Knowhere, Cosmo used her telekinetic powers to attach the two together, allowing for the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], along with all the children they were rescuing to safely get across onto Knowhere. The effort soon became too much for Cosmo, who began to tire, so [[Mantis]] came to her aid and used her empathic powers to give Cosmo more strength. While Cosmo was able to hold on long enough for the Guardians to recuse all the animals and jump across, Quill fell behind right as Cosmo passed out from exhaustion and let go of her hold. [[File:Cosmo Howl.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo howling during the celebrations]] Luckily, Quill was saved by [[Adam Warlock]] and returned to Knowhere, where everyone gathered around Quill and hugged him, with Cosmo licking his face. In the aftermath, as the citizens helped the newcomers, [[Rocket]] began playing music and danced, so everyone joined in on the dancing to celebrate. As Cosmo danced alongside Obfonteri and [[Blurp]], she also found an [[Orloni]] and began playing with it in her mouth. Cosmo then let out a howl, and the rest of the Guardians all joined in by howling.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===The New Guardians=== ====Battle of Krylor==== [[File:Cosmo as a Guardian.png|{{AltFloat}}|Cosmo alongside the new [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] lineup]] {{Quote|On your word, Kapitan."
"Word.|Cosmo and [[Rocket Raccoon]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Now serving under the leadership of [[Rocket Raccoon]], Cosmo remained as a member of the new [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], consisting of [[Groot]], [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], [[Adam Warlock]], [[Blurp]] and [[Phyla]]. The new Guardians found themselves on [[Krylor]], defending a settlement from a stampede of creatures. Prior to the battle, the Guardians discussed their favorite artists and bands on Rocket's [[Star-Lord's Zune|Zune]]. Soon enough, they found themselves charging at the incoming stampede to defend the settlement.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Cosmo, what use is telekinesis if you can't even aim?|[[Rocket]] to Cosmo|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} *'''Artificially Enhanced Physiology''': Cosmo underwent experiments which caused her to gain various powers such as psionics powers and longevity. **'''Enhanced Durability''': Cosmo is highly durable, as she was able to survive an explosion caused by the [[Power Stone]] in the [[Collector's Museum]]. **'''Enhanced Intelligence''': Cosmo can talk and communicate with other species, as well as perform complex tasks, unlike other members of her species. **'''Longevity''': Cosmo has been alive since the Soviet Union launched her into space, indicating a lifespan much greater than that of the average dog. **'''Psionics''': [[File:Cosmo Telekinesis.png|thumb|250px|Cosmo moving objects with telekinesis]] Cosmo is capable of using psionic powers such as telepathy and telekinesis. ***'''Telepathy''': Cosmo has some form of telepathy.{{Ref|MSCEUE}} ***'''Telekinesis''': Cosmo is capable of moving objects through her mind. She used these abilities to assist Rocket Raccoon in repairing buildings on Knowhere. Cosmo used her telekinesis to lift two giant debris to kill [[Behemoth]] and she was later able to stop the [[Arête Laboratories]] from crashing into [[Knowhere]]. ===Abilities=== *'''Marksman''': Cosmo accurately hit every target with a pebble while demonstrating her telekinesis. *'''Bilingualism''': Cosmo can understand [[Groot]] due to spending time and bonding with him.[https://web.archive.org/web/20220501152441/https://twitter.com/jamesgunn/status/1556380554454568967 James Gunn on Twitter - August 7, 2022] ==Equipment== ===Other Equipment=== *'''Soviet Union Space Suit''': Cosmo wears a space suit from the days of the Soviet Union to help her survive the harsh environments of space. Her suit originally included a helmet, which appears to have been removed some time before December 2025. *'''Aluminium Neck Ring''': With her high-tech collar,{{Ref|MSCEUE}} Cosmo can communicate with others. *'''[[Translator Implant]]''': Cosmo has a translator implant that helps her understand many of the languages spoken in the universe.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1639784535884984322?s=20 James Gunn on Twitter - March 25, 2023] ==Facilities== *'''[[Collector's Museum]]''': Cosmo was kept in a cage in the Collector's Museum after being found by the [[Collector]]. After most of the museum exploded, she escaped from her cage but stayed in the remains of the museum. ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Soviet Union]] *[[Tivan Group]] **[[Collector|Taneleer Tivan/Collector]] - Former Owner **[[Carina]] † *[[Howard the Duck]] - Friend *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] - Teammates and Close Friends **[[Gamora]] † **[[Rocket Raccoon]] - Leader **[[Groot]] **[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] - Best Friend **[[Adam Warlock]] - Former Enemy **[[Phyla]] **[[Blurp]] *[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] - Former Leader and Close Friend *[[Drax the Destroyer]] - Former Teammate and Close Friend *[[Nebula]] - Former Teammate and Close Friend *[[Mantis]] - Former Teammate and Close Friend *[[Bzermikitokolok and the Knowheremen]] **[[Bzermikitokolok]] - Friend **[[Kortolbookalia]] **[[Sliyavastojoo]] **[[Phloko]] *[[Hoobtoe]] *[[Steemie Blueliver]] *[[Orloni Peddler]] *[[Xlomo Smeth]] *[[Kevin Bacon]] - Friend *[[Broker]] - Friend *[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] - Former Teammate {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos]] † *[[OrgoCorp]] **[[High Evolutionary]] *[[Hell Spawn]] **[[Behemoth]] † - Victim {{col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Cosmo was a male dog and test animal of the [[Soviet Union|Soviet]] Space program. He was launched into [[Earth]]'s orbit as part of an experiment in the [[1960s]] but drifted off into space. He later arrived on Knowhere and became mutated, gaining telepathic and telekinetic abilities. *Although she was introduced in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' as male, she was revealed to be female following the casting of [[Maria Bakalova]]. *Cosmo was created as a Marvel character loosely based on the real life story of {{WPS|Laika}}, a Soviet dog that was sent into space aboard the {{WPS|Sputnik 2}} to test whether it was possible for humans to survive the launch and conditions of outer space. [[James Gunn]] opted on making Cosmo a female in the MCU as an homage to Laika.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1551047164205314048 James Gunn on Twitter - July 24, 2022] *Cosmo has a cameo in the end-credits sequence of ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]''. *Cosmo is a fan of {{WPS|The Carpenters}}. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Anthony Russo]] revealed that Cosmo was supposed to appear in ''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]'', but she was ultimately cut to focus on the film's narrative.[http://fandom.wikia.com/articles/howard-the-duck-featured-in-early-draft-of-avengers-infinity-war-script Howard the Duck Featured in Early Draft of ‘Avengers: Infinity War’ Script] ==References== {{Gallery|Cosmo the Spacedog/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/cosmo-the-spacedog}} {{Navbox Guardians of the Galaxy}} [[es:Cosmo]] [[fr:Cosmo]] [[pl:Cosmo]] [[pt-br:Cosmo]] [[ru:Космо]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy (film) Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Characters]] [[Category:The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special Characters]] [[Category:Dogs]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Collector's Museum Exhibits]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Members]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:Genderbent for the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
